name: Christmas Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients in the order specified on the package directions.
2. Combine all the mixed ingredients together.
3. Refrigerate for 24 hours before serving.
This has been a favorite recipe for years at Christmas time. My brother and I, as well as my own three children, always ask for it when we are home during the holidays. It is absolutely delicious paired with homemade Christmas cookies.
